name: Pork and Summer Vegetables Mediterranean Style
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lbs green beans, cut into 2-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Place a large pot (Dutch oven) on the burner and set it to high heat. Allow it to heat for a few minutes.
2. Add the pork to the pot and brown it for about 5 minutes.
3. Add the cubed potatoes to the pot and stir, then cook for 10-15 minutes.
4. Add the spices and green beans, cooking for an additional 5 minutes.
5. Pour in the stock or water and cover the pot. Turn the heat down to medium and cook for 10 minutes.
6. Check that the pork reaches an internal temperature of 160°F (71°C).
7. Once cooked, mix in the lemon juice.
8. When serving, garnish with feta cheese.
